summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Market Data page refactoring and KTB Historical Data Views feature. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). All 10 frontend features verified working correctly. The MarketDataPage was successfully refactored from ~1500 lines to ~55 lines with functionality preserved in separate tab components.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/market/turkish-exchanges returns prices
Backend: GET /api/market/turkish-exchanges?date={date} filters by date
Backend: GET /api/market/turkish-exchanges/dates returns dates grouped by exchange (KTB, GTB)
Backend: GET /api/market/turkish-exchanges/monthly returns aggregated monthly data with Min/Max/Avg/DataPoints
Backend: GET /api/market/turkish-exchanges/scrape triggers scraping and stores prices
Backend: Turkish exchange endpoints require authentication
Backend: GET /api/market/notes returns market notes
Backend: POST/DELETE /api/market/notes creates and deletes notes
Backend: GET /api/market/notes/years returns archive years
Backend: GET /api/market/coaster-freights/{week} returns freight data
Backend: GET /api/market/prices returns all 9 commodities/currencies
Backend: Gold price is in correct range (~$4500)
Backend: All commodities have isLive=true and source=Barchart
Backend: TMO Tenders CRUD operations work correctly
Frontend: Login flow works with salih.karagoz / salih123
Frontend: Market Data page loads with all 5 tabs (Indications, Prices, Turkish Exchanges, TMO Tenders, Coaster Freights)
Frontend: Indications tab shows INDICATIONS title, breadcrumb navigation (Years/Month/Day), 4 commodity cards
Frontend: Comment submission works in Indications tab
Frontend: Prices tab shows Live Market Prices table with 9 rows, chart displays
Frontend: Turkish Exchanges tab shows Latest/Daily/Monthly buttons, KTB and GTB cards
Frontend: Turkish Exchanges Monthly view shows year/month selectors and aggregated data
Frontend: TMO Tenders tab shows TMO / TURKISH GRAIN BOARD title, New Tender button works
Frontend: Coaster Freights tab shows year tabs (2023-2026) and week selectors
Frontend: Telegram sidebar visible with 7 channels configured and 50 messages
critical_code_review_comments: MarketDataPage.js successfully refactored from ~1500 lines to ~55 lines - clean separation of concerns
All tab components (IndicationsTab, PricesTab, TurkishExchangesTab, TMOTendersTab, CoasterFreightsTab, TelegramSidebar) properly modularized
New backend endpoints /api/market/turkish-exchanges/dates and /api/market/turkish-exchanges/monthly implemented correctly
Monthly aggregation uses MongoDB aggregation pipeline with proper date regex matching
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Minor ESLint warnings in IndicationsTab.js and PricesTab.js about useEffect dependencies - not critical
seed_data_creation: Test tenders created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: MarketDataPage refactoring complete. All 5 tabs working: Indications (market commentary with date navigation), Prices (live CBOT/forex prices with charts), Turkish Exchanges (KTB/GTB with Latest/Daily/Monthly views), TMO Tenders (tender management), Coaster Freights (weekly freight reports). New endpoints: /api/market/turkish-exchanges/dates returns available dates by exchange, /api/market/turkish-exchanges/monthly returns aggregated monthly data. Telegram sidebar shows 7 configured channels with live messages.

ktb_historical_data_views.latest_view: Shows most recent prices for KTB and GTB
ktb_historical_data_views.daily_view: Year > Month > Date navigation to browse historical prices
ktb_historical_data_views.monthly_view: Year > Month navigation with aggregated Min/Max/Avg/DataPoints

all_tabs_working.indications: INDICATIONS title, breadcrumb nav, 4 commodity cards, comment submission
all_tabs_working.prices: Live Market Prices table, 9 commodities, Live badges, price chart
all_tabs_working.turkish_exchanges: Latest/Daily/Monthly buttons, KTB/GTB cards, Fetch Prices button
all_tabs_working.tmo_tenders: TMO / TURKISH GRAIN BOARD title, New Tender button, tender cards
all_tabs_working.coaster_freights: Year tabs (2023-2026), week selectors, freight reports
